svg.title: AI/ML Engineer Roadmap
svg.desc: A phased roadmap from 3rd year B.Tech to high-paying AI/ML engineer role

g.text: You are here — 3rd year B.Tech AI & ML
Phase 3 — Job hunt mode (final sem + after grad)
Fast track tip — what separates ₹12L from ₹30L+ offers
Deployed projects > certificates • GenAI + LLMs = highest demand right now
Niche expertise > generalist • Open source contributions = interview bypass
Research paper (even 1) = massive resume boost for top-tier companies
